evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Is on a stable regimen of background antihypertensive agent(s) for at least 8 weeks and would be considered a candidate for an additional antihypertensive agent at the time of screening ;~* Has a mean seated systolic blood pressure (SBP) ≥ 140 mmHg or ≥ 130 mmHg if diabetic;~* Demonstrates ability to be adherent to the study drug and their anti-hypertensive medication during a run-in period~* If taking an SGLT2 inhibitor, the regimen must be stable for at least 8 weeks pri...
